phrase_tracker_add.event_note: L1 word-order calque (два последних → the last two)

phrase_tracker_add.awkward: Unlikely that the load will be substantially different
phrase_tracker_add.natural: the load probably won't change much

phrase_tracker_add.awkward: is it appropriate for this stage?
phrase_tracker_add.natural: is it the right call at this stage?
as the coach already has it laid out
phrase_tracker_add.event_note: Word choice: 'drew' from нарисовал; native idiom is 'laid out'

phrase_tracker_add.awkward: where you want to spend an effort
phrase_tracker_add.event_note: L1 calque (приложить усилие -> spend an effort)

phrase_tracker_add.awkward: What is the value of the AeT test in Bahrain
phrase_tracker_add.natural: What's the point of the AeT test in Bahrain
phrase_tracker_add.event_note: Register: 'value of' is academic; 'point of' is the conversational form
Register: 'sufficient' is formal; 'enough' is conversational. Also detail uncountable here.

phrase_tracker_add.awkward: Prepare to make the changes as discussed to the plan
phrase_tracker_add.natural: Get ready to apply the changes we discussed
phrase_tracker_add.event_note: Stiff verb chain + dangling 'to the plan'
Register: 'propose' is formal; 'what to do best' is awkward word order

phrase_tracker_add.awkward: what should I say to you to send the changes
phrase_tracker_add.natural: how do I tell you to push the changes
phrase_tracker_add.event_note: L1 phrasing ('что мне сказать тебе чтобы') + git vocab ('send' -> 'push')
